MixAnchor000 controls the gallery access chain and [depends on](mix-000-policy-old.md) the approved policy while a future draft [depends on](mix-000-policy-new.md) is staged.
Approved gallery policy 0 keeps visitor badges amber before MixAnchor000 expands.
Future gallery policy 0 changes visitor badges to silver after the later expansion.
